case1_quote: « A customer writes at 10pm asking for prices and availability. LocalReply replies instantly in French AND German. »
case2_quote: « A customer asks about emergency interventions on Sunday. The AI replies on rates and collects contact details. »
case3_quote: « English, Italian and Spanish tourists ask about the menu, allergens and availability — each in their own language. »
cta_sub: Join the businesses and freelancers who never miss a customer. Set up in 5 minutes, running 24/7.
feat1_desc: FR, EN, DE, IT, ES, PT, NL, PL. The AI detects and replies in the customer's language instantly.
feat2_desc: Prices, hours, FAQ, services, address, parking, payments... The AI knows your business by heart.
feat3_desc: 4 modes: Google Calendar, external link (Planity, TheFork…), manual or disabled.
feat4_desc: No answer? The AI alerts you, you reply once, it remembers.
feat5_desc: Get an SMS as soon as a customer requests an appointment or asks an urgent question.
feat6_desc: Charts, daily AI summaries, missing FAQ detected, opportunities identified.
features_not_sub: Not just a chatbot — a real business assistant that learns and grows with you.
features_sub: Not just a chatbot — a real business assistant that learns and grows with you.
hero_sub: The AI assistant that replies to your customers in 8 languages, 24/7. Share your QR code or link — no app to download.
how_step1_desc: Enter your services, prices, opening hours, FAQ and practical info.
how_step2_desc: Connect Google Calendar, enter an external link (Planity, Doctolib, TheFork…), or manage manually.
how_step3_desc: From your dashboard, download and print your personalized QR code poster.
how_step4_desc: Your AI replies 24/7. You manage everything from your dashboard.
how_sub: No technical skills required. Complete documentation available.
inuse_sub: In your window, on tables, on your social media — a simple QR code or link, and your AI replies instantly. No app, no sign-up.
inuse_title1: One scan is all it takes.
link_desc: is ready. Paste it in your Instagram bio, website, Google My Business or messages.
meta_title: LocalReply — The 24/7 AI assistant for your business
more_bold: Wherever your customers go, your AI can be there.
more_text: And many more — flyers, WhatsApp, Google Business, packaging, storefronts…
sectors_sub: Whatever your industry — LocalReply adapts to your business in minutes.
usecase_note: Illustrative scenarios — based on real cases
usecase_sub: Real scenarios, every day, for businesses like yours.
why_a1: LocalReply gives you a conversational storefront in 5 minutes. A link, a QR code — your customers can talk to you immediately.
why_a2: A website shows info. LocalReply replies. Instantly, in 8 languages, 24/7.
why_a3: Connect your Google Calendar in 1 click. The AI checks availability, collects info and sends you the requests.
why_a4: In Europe, 1 in 3 customers speaks another language. LocalReply detects and responds automatically in 8 languages.
why_q1: You don't have an online presence yet?
why_q2: You have a website, but it doesn't respond?
why_q3: You want to manage your appointments automatically?
why_q4: You have customers who speak other languages?
why_sub: Every evening, customers message your business. Without a reply, they go to a competitor.
